mapper.update: UPDATE NIA.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl SET CLOS_TIME = now() , CLOS_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE TICKET_ID = #{ticketId}
UPDATE NIA.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl SET CLOS_TIME = now() , CLOS_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE CLOS_STATUS NOT IN ('Y') AND SELF_PROCESS_TYPE = 'S' AND ALARMNO = #{alarmno}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl WHERE ticket_id = #{num} or alarmno = #{num}
mapper.select: SELECT auto.self_process_no, auto.self_process_group, auto.self_process_type, auto.clos_type, auto.feedback_msg, auto.occur_time, auto.feedback_time, auto.ticket_id, auto.ticket_type, auto.alarmno, auto.clos_status, auto.clos_time FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl auto LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current rca ON auto.ticket_id = rca.ticket_id WHERE auto.clos_status = 'N' AND (rca.status = 'AUTO_FIN' or rca.status = 'FIN');

SELECT auto.self_process_no, auto.self_process_group, auto.self_process_type, auto.clos_type, auto.feedback_msg, auto.occur_time, auto.feedback_time, auto.ticket_id, auto.ticket_type, auto.alarmno, auto.clos_status, auto.clos_time FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl auto LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst tsam ON tsam.alarmno = auto.alarmno WHERE auto.clos_status = 'N' AND tsam.status = 'AUTO_FIN';

SELECT AI.TICKET_ID,AI.TICKET_TYPE , STRRESNM, STRIPADDR , STRIFNAME, STRIFDESC, STRIFSPEED, STRIFTYPE, STRIFOPERSTATUS , NREN_ID, NREN_NAME, NODE_ID, IF_ID , T.STRIFID, T.STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP , INTYEAR, INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR, INTMIN, INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT, FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX, FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX, AI.AI_ACCURACY FROM ( SELECT NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM, NULL AS STRIPADDR , PM.IF_NM AS STRIFNAME, PM.IF_DESC AS STRIFDESC, PM.IF_SPEED AS STRIFSPEED, PM.IF_TYPE AS STRIFTYPE, PM.IF_OPER_STATUS AS STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, UO.NODE_ID, UO.IF_ID , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID, PM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID, '1' AS STRTYPEMIN, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)-32400 AS INTTIMESTAMP , DATE_PART('YEAR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTYEAR , DATE_PART('MONTH'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMONTH , DATE_PART('DAY'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTDAY , DATE_PART('HOUR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTHOUR , DATE_PART('MINUTE'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMIN , EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) AS INTWEEK , LT.measured_datetime AS MEASURED_DATETIME , 0 AS INTBANDWIDTH, LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN, LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT, LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN, LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT , 0 AS FLTERRORIN, 0 AS FLTERROROUT, 0 AS FLTDISCARDIN, 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUT, 0 AS FLTUNKNOWN , 0 AS FLTUSAGE, 0 AS FLHCINOCTETS, 0 AS FLHCOUTOCTETS, 0 AS FLHCINUCASTPKTS, 0 AS FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, 0 AS FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, 0 AS FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, 0 AS FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, 0 AS FLTBPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTBPSOUTMAX, 0 AS FLTPPSINMAX, 0 AS FLTPPSOUTMAX, 0 AS FLTERRORINMAX, 0 AS FLTERROROUTMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDINMAX, 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, 0 AS FLTUNKNOWNMAX, 0 AS FLTUSAGEMAX FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) and LOWER(n.node_name) = PM.node_id INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE LT.MEASURED_DATETIME >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days' ) T INNER JOIN ( SELECT A1T.STRIFID, A1T.STRRESID, A1T.MEASURED_DATETIME, TS.AI_ACCURACY, TC.ticket_id ,TC.ticket_type , TC.fault_time FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC A1T left OUTER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON A1T.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID left outer join RCA.tb_rca_ticket_current TC on A1T.TICKET_ID = TC.ticket_id where TC.TICKET_ID = #{ticketId} ) AI ON T.STRIFID = AI.STRIFID AND T.STRRESID = AI.STRRESID and T.MEASURED_DATETIME = AI.FAULT_TIME

SELECT TR.TICKET_ID, TR.TICKET_TYPE, TNT.STRRESNUM, TNT.STRRESIP, TNT.STRRESNAME, TNT.STRS_IP, TNT.STRS_PORT, TNT.STRD_IP, TNT.STRD_PORT, TNT.STRS_MAC, TNT.STRD_MAC, TNT.STRPROTOCOL, TNT.STRIPV4TOS, TNT.STRCHANNEL, TNT.STRSENDERIP, TNT.STRIN_INTERFACE, TNT.STROUT_INTERFACE, TNT.STRBYTES_COL, TNT.STRCOUNTS, TO_CHAR(TNT.DATEREGDATE, 'HH24:MI.0') AS DATEREGDATE, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_NOXIOUS_TRAFFIC TNT LEFT OUTER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON TNT.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID INNER JOIN RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT TR ON TR.TICKET_ID = TNT.TICKET_ID WHERE TR.TICKET_ID = #{num}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_SOP ( sop_id, ticket_id, ticket_type, ticket_result, status, request_time, receive_time, detail, fault_classify, fault_type, fault_detail_content, etc_content, ai_accuracy, fault_type_content, start_time, end_time, handling_ack_user, handling_ack_time, handling_fin_user, handling_fin_time, autoproc_type, zero1_model, zero1_entropy ) VALUES ( #{sopId}, #{ticketId}, #{ticketType}, #{ticketResult}, #{status}, now(), NULL, #{detail}, #{faultClassify}, #{faultType}, #{faultDetailContent}, #{etcContent}, #{aiAccuracy}, #{faultTypeContent}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{handlingAckUser},
now()
null,
#{handlingFinUser}, now(), #{autoprocType}, #{zero1Model}::int, #{zero1Entropy}::double precision );
mapper.update: update rca.tb_rca_ticket_current set zero1_model = #{model}::int , zero1_entropy = #{entropy}::double precision where ticket_id = #{ticketId}
update rca.tb_rca_ticket_current set zero1_model = #{model}::int , zero1_entropy = #{entropy}::double precision where ticket_id = #{ticketId}

update nia.tb_sop set fault_classify = '비장애' , fault_type = '장애무효' , fault_detail_content = '장애무효' , ticket_type = 'FTT' ,zero1_model = #{model}::int , zero1_entropy = #{entropy}::double precision where ticket_id = #{ticketId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nia.tb_syslog_sop ( sop_id, alarmno, fault_classify, fault_type, fault_detail_content, etc_content, status, proc_status, alarm_occur_time, handling_fin_user, handling_fin_time, alarmloc ) VALUES( nextval('nia.seq_syslog_sop_id'), #{alarmno}, #{faultClassify}, #{faultType}, #{faultDetailContent}, #{etcContent}, #{status}, #{procStatus}, #{alarmOccurTime}::timestamp, #{handlingFinUser}, now(), #{alarmloc} )
mapper.select: SELECT fltbpsin, ROUND(fltbpsin_predict:: NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_predict, ROUND(fltbpsin_threshold_upper::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_threshold_upper, ROUND(fltbpsin_threshold_lower::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_threshold_lower, fltbpsin_anomaly, fltbpsout, ROUND(fltbpsout_predict:: NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_predict, ROUND(fltbpsout_threshold_upper::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_threshold_upper, ROUND(fltbpsout_threshold_lower::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_threshold_lower, fltbpsout_anomaly FROM rca.tb_anomalous_ai_result a INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst p ON a.strresid = p.node_num and a.strifid = p.if_num WHERE p.node_id= #{nodeid} AND p.if_id = #{ifid} AND measured_datetime = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{time}::int)

SELECT fltbpsin, ROUND(fltbpsin_predict:: NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_predict, ROUND(fltbpsin_threshold_upper::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_threshold_upper, ROUND(fltbpsin_threshold_lower::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_threshold_lower, fltbpsin_anomaly, fltbpsout, ROUND(fltbpsout_predict:: NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_predict, ROUND(fltbpsout_threshold_upper::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_threshold_upper, ROUND(fltbpsout_threshold_lower::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_threshold_lower, fltbpsout_anomaly FROM rca.tb_anomalous_ai_result a INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst p ON a.strresid = p.node_num and a.strifid = p.if_num WHERE p.node_id= #{nodeid} AND p.if_id = #{ifid} AND measured_datetime = to_timestamp(#{time}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.MS')

SELECT AL_ID.ticket_id, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ FROM ( SELECT ticket_id, max(ticket_al_id) AS ticket_al_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY ticket_id ) AL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL on al.ticket_id = al_id.ticket_id and AL.ticket_al_id = AL_ID.ticket_al_id where root_cause_sysnamea is not null and root_cause_sysnamez is not null and AL.ticket_id = #{ticketId}
select a.parent_ticket_id from rca.tb_rca_ticket_current a where a.ticket_id = #{ticketId}
